name: crawlit
description: Agent skill pack for local Crawlit scraping, crawling, and mapping.

install.claudeCode: claude plugin marketplace add arufian/crawlit-skill && claude plugin install crawlit@crawlit-skills
install.codex: codex plugin marketplace add arufian/crawlit-skill && codex plugin add crawlit@crawlit-skills
install.agentSkillsCli: gh skill install arufian/crawlit-skill skills/crawlit --agent codex --scope user
